info.title: GL.iNet Router 4.x API — modem module
info.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 API exposed at POST /rpc on GL.iNet routers. All methods use JSON-RPC method `call` with params = [sid, module, function, args?]. Auth is a separate challenge/login flow yielding `sid`.

methods.name: modem.get_info
methods.summary: Get the modems hardware information

modems.description: The hardward info of all cellular modems in the devices

devices.description: Port list of devices of the cellular modem

type.description: The cellular modem type [0: built-in supported modem; 1: external supported modem; 2: unsupported modem]

bus.description: The PCIe path (Format: {domain}:{bus}:{slot}.{func}) or the USB path (Format: {bus}-{port[.port[.port]]}) for the cellular modem, depends on how the modem is connected

at_port.description: The AT command port of the cellular modem

data_port.description: The data port of the cellular modem, It is used when using the 3G protocol

sms_support.description: Whether the cellular modem support SMS

lock_tower_support.description: Whether the cellular modem support tower locking

qcfg_unsupport.description: Whether the cellular modem does not support to set band by AT+QCFG command (true means it doesn't support this command, need to disable AT command set_band)

imei.description: The IMEI of the cellular modem

name.description: The name of the cellular modem (Some modem may include the software version)

version.description: The version detail of the cellular modem

vendor.description: The vendor of the cellular modem

protocols.description: List of connection protocols supported by the cellular modem (Possible values in the list are 3g, ncm, qmi, qcm, directip, callip)

simcard.description: The SIM card information plugged into the cellular modem (The object is not returned if SIM is not detected)

iccid.description: The ICCID of the SIM card (The value may not be available if the SIM card requires a PIN to unlock)

phone_number.description: The phone nubmer of the SIM card (The value may not be available if the SIM card requires a PIN to unlock or the SIM card does not store the phone number)

mcc.description: Mobile Country Code MCC (Mobile Country Code) of the SIM card, (Co-identify with the MNC the mobile network operator to which the SIM card belongs, the value may not be available if the SIM card requires a PIN)

mnc.description: Mobile Network Code MNC (Mobile Network Code) of the SIM card, (Co-identify with the MCC the mobile network operator to which the SIM card belongs, the value may not be available if the SIM card requires a PIN)

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found]

methods.name: modem.get_status
methods.summary: Get the modems status

modems.description: The status of all cellular modems in the devices

bus.description: The PCIe path (Format: {domain}:{bus}:{slot}.{func}) or the USB path (Format: {bus}-{port[.port[.port]]}) for the cellular modem, depends on how the modem is connected

current_sim.description: The SIM card currently used by the device, this value is only available for dual card slot devices [1: SIM 1; 2: SIM 2]

switch_status.description: The state of the device's sim card slots, this value is only available for dual card slot devices [0: Active SIM not switched; 1: Switched to backup SIM due to failover]

oneOf.title: Switched to backup SIM due to failover

simcard.description: The status of the SIM card plugged into the cellular modem(this object will not be returned if no SIM card is recognized)

status.description: The registration status of the SIM card [0: Registered; 1: Unregistered; 2: SIM card needs to be unlocked by PIN code]

oneOf.title: SIM card needs to be unlocked by PIN code

carrier.description: The network operator's name of the SIM card (The value may not be available if the SIM card requires a PIN to unlock or the SIM card does not store the name)

iccid.description: The ICCID (Integrated Circuit Card Identification Number) of the SIM card (The value may not be available if the SIM card requires a PIN to unlock)

phone_number.description: The phone nubmer of the SIM card (The value may not be available if the SIM card requires a PIN to unlock or the SIM card does not store the phone number)

mcc.description: MCC (Mobile Country Code) of the SIM card, (Co-identify with the MNC the mobile network operator to which the SIM card belongs, the value may not be available if the SIM card requires a PIN)

mnc.description: MNC (Mobile Network Code) of the SIM card, (Co-identify with the MCC the mobile network operator to which the SIM card belongs, the value may not be available if the SIM card requires a PIN)

signal.description: Signal-related status of the SIM card (This object is not returned if the celluluar is not registered with the network)

mode.description: Network mode [2: 2G mode; 3: 3G mode; 4: 4G mode; 5: 5G mode; 41: 4G+ mode]

strength.description: Overall signal strength [1: Poor; 2: Fair; 3: Good; 4: Excellent]

rsrp.description: Reference signal received power (Unit: dBm), it only returned in 4G or 4G+ mode

rsrq.description: Reference signal received quality (Unit: dB), it only returned in 4G or 4G+ mode

sinr.description: Signal to interference-plus-noise ratio (Unit: dB), it only returned in 4G or 4G+ mode

ecio.description: Energy to interference ratio, it only returned in 3G mode

network.description: Network status of the cellular modem (this object will not be returned if the cellular interface is disabled)

tx.description: Total data size transmitted (Unit: Byte), it is only returned in connected status, i.e. network.status is 0

rx.description: Total data size receive (Unit: Byte), it is only returned in connected status, i.e. network.status is 0

ipv4.description: IPv4 network status of the cellular modem, the object is only returned in connected status, i.e. network.status is 0

ip.description: The IPv4 address obtained by the cellular modem

netmask.description: The IPv4 subnet mask obtained by the cellular modem

gateway.description: The IPv4 gateway obtained by the cellular modem

dns.description: The IPv4 DNS server list obtained by the cellular modem

ipv6.description: IPv6 network status of cellular modem, this object is only returned if IPv6 is enabled and in connected status, i.e. network.status is 0

ip.description: The IPv6 address (contain the prefix) obtained by the cellular modem

gateway.description: The IPv6 gateway obtained by the cellular modem

dns.description: The IPv6 DNS server list obtained by the cellulayixiugair modem

passthrough.description: Passthrough information, this object is returned when the device works in passthrough mode

enable.description: Enabled status of passthrough [0: Disabled; 1: Enabled]

ip.description: The IPv4 address from passthrough mode

gateway.description: The IPv4 gateway from passthrough mode

netmask.description: The IPv4 subnet mask from passthrough mode

dns.description: The IPv4 DNS server list from passthrough mode

err_code.description: Error code [-1: Failed to get information]

methods.name: modem.set_connect
methods.summary: Set the dial-up settings of the cellular modem and connect

schema.description: The PCIe path (Format: {domain}:{bus}:{slot}.{func}) or the USB path (Format: {bus}-{port[.port[.port]]}) for the cellular modem, depends on how the modem is connected, which can be gotten from the get_info interface
Handle mode, which defines how to handle the submitted settings [0: Apply but not save; 1: Save but not apply; 2: Save and apply]
Apply to the target cellular modem or saved settings

device.description: Port of the device used for connection

service.description: Service type, it is required only when using 3G protocol, i.e. protocol is 3g

username.description: Username for authentication, it is only valid when auth is not NONE

password.description: Password for authentication, it is only valid when auth is not NONE

dial_number.description: Dial number, it is required only when using 3G protocol, i.e. protocol is 3g

ttl.description: Data packet TTL (Time to Live), the data packets sent by the cellular interface will be forced to use the value after setting

ttl_ipv6.description: Data packet IPV6 TTL (Time to Live), the data packets sent by the cellular interface will be forced to use the value after setting

pin_code.description: PIN code, it required to unlock the SIM card

roaming.description: Whether data roaming is enabled [0: Disabled; 1: Enabled]

band_enable.description: Whether channel filtering(masking) is enabled [0: Disabled; 1: Enabled]

band_filter_mode.description: Channel filtering mode [0: allowlist mode, only allow the specified channel; 1: blocklist mode, block the use of the specified channel]

band_list.description: Specify the list of channels to be allow or block, divided into 3 number arrays LTE, NA-SA, NR-NSA

id.description: The ID (as unique identifier) for the saved settings, only returned when saving the settings (mode is not 0)

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found]

methods.name: modem.get_config
methods.summary: Get the target cellular modem settings

schema.description: The PCIe path (Format: {domain}:{bus}:{slot}.{func}) or the USB path (Format: {bus}-{port[.port[.port]]}) for the cellular modem, depends on how the modem is connected, which can be gotten from the get_info interface

device.description: Port of the device used for connection

service.description: Service type, it is required only when using 3G protocol, i.e. protocol is 3g

username.description: Username for authentication, it is only valid when auth is not NONE

password.description: Password for authentication, it is only valid when auth is not NONE

dial_number.description: Dial number, it is required only when using 3G protocol, i.e. protocol is 3g

ttl_ipv6.description: Data packet IPV6 TTL (Time to Live)

passthrough.description: Passthrough information, this object is returned when the device works in passthrough mode

enable.description: Enabled status of passthrough [0: Disabled; 1: Enabled]

ip.description: The IPv4 address from passthrough mode

gateway.description: The IPv4 gateway from passthrough mode

netmask.description: The IPv4 subnet mask from passthrough mode

dns.description: The IPv4 DNS server list from passthrough mode

band_info.description: List of supported channels in current network mode, divided into 3 number arrays LTE, NA-SA, NR-NSA

roaming.description: Whether data roaming is enabled [0: Disabled; 1: Enabled]

band_enable.description: Whether channel filtering(masking) is enabled [0: Disabled; 1: Enabled]

band_filter_mode.description: Channel filtering mode [0: allowlist mode, only allow the specified channel; 1: blocklist mode, block the use of the specified channel]

band_list.description: Specify the list of channels to be allow or block, divided into 3 number arrays LTE, NA-SA, NR-NSA

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found]

methods.name: modem.set_auto_connect
methods.summary: Automatically set up and connect to the network based on the SIM card information plugged into the target cellular modem.

schema.description: The PCIe path (Format: {domain}:{bus}:{slot}.{func}) or the USB path (Format: {bus}-{port[.port[.port]]}) for the cellular modem, depends on how the modem is connected, which can be gotten from the get_info interface

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found]

methods.name: modem.disconnect
methods.summary: Disconnect the network connection of the target cellular modem

schema.description: The PCIe path (Format: {domain}:{bus}:{slot}.{func}) or the USB path (Format: {bus}-{port[.port[.port]]}) for the cellular modem, depends on how the modem is connected, which can be gotten from the get_info interface

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found]

methods.name: modem.send_at_command
methods.summary: Send AT commands to the target cellular modem

schema.description: The PCIe path (Format: {domain}:{bus}:{slot}.{func}) or the USB path (Format: {bus}-{port[.port[.port]]}) for the cellular modem, depends on how the modem is connected, which can be gotten from the get_info interface
The port of the device on which the modem receives the AT command, which can be gotten from the get_info interface (Only the ttyUSBX port supports AT commands)
AT command to request (No more than 256 Bytes)

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found; -2: Command exceeds the length limit; -3: Unsupported operation; -4: Unknown error]

oneOf.title: The cellular modem was not found

methods.name: modem.reboot_modem
methods.summary: Reboot the target cellular modem

schema.description: The PCIe path (Format: {domain}:{bus}:{slot}.{func}) or the USB path (Format: {bus}-{port[.port[.port]]}) for the cellular modem, depends on how the modem is connected, which can be gotten from the get_info interface
Whether this operation uses the hard reboot, i.e. forced reboot by power-off/power-on method.

wait_time.description: The time to wait for this reboot operation (Unit: Seconds)

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found; -2: Failure to reboot]

oneOf.title: The cellular modem was not found

methods.name: modem.get_cells_info
methods.summary: Get the network cells information of the target cellular modem

schema.description: The PCIe path (Format: {domain}:{bus}:{slot}.{func}) or the USB path (Format: {bus}-{port[.port[.port]]}) for the cellular modem, depends on how the modem is connected, which can be gotten from the get_info interface

type.description: The network cell type [servingcell: Serving cell; neighbourcell: Neighbouring cell]

id.description: The network cell ID, It is only returned if the network cell is a serving cell

mode.description: Network mode [LTE; WCDMA; TDSCDMA; CDMA; HDR; GSM]

band.description: Work band, It is only returned if the network cell is a serving cell and mode is LTE

dl_bandwidth.description: Download bandwith, It is only returned if the network cell is a serving cell and mode is LTE

ul_bandwidth.description: Upload bandwith, It is only returned if the network cell is a serving cell and mode is LTE

rssi.description: Received signal strength indicator, It is only returned if the network cell is a serving cell and mode is LTE

rsrp.description: Reference signal received power (Unit: dBm), It is only returned if the network cell is a serving cell and mode is LTE

rsrq.description: Reference signal received quality (Unit: dB), It is only returned if the network cell is a serving cell and mode is LTE

sinr.description: Signal to interference-plus-noise ratio (Unit: dB), It is only returned if the network cell is a serving cell and mode is LTE

ecio.description: Energy to interference ratio, It is only returned if the network cell is a serving cell and mode is WCDMA,TDSCDMA, CDMA, HDR

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found; -2: Failed to get cells information]

oneOf.title: The cellular modem was not found

methods.name: modem.get_sms_list
methods.summary: Get SMS list

name.description: The unique identifier for the SMS

bus.description: The PCIe path (Format: {domain}:{bus}:{slot}.{func}) or the USB path (Format: {bus}-{port[.port[.port]]}) for the cellular modem, depends on how the modem is connected, whic is used to distinguish which module the SMS come from

date.description: The time when the SMS was received (Format: YY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss)

body.description: The SMS content, encoding format is UTF-8

status.description: The Status of the SMS [0: Unread; 1: Read; 2: Sent; 3: Sending; 4: Waiting for send; 5: Failed to send]

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found]

methods.name: modem.remove_sms
methods.summary: Remove SMS

schema.description: Range of SMS to be removed [0: All unread SMS; 1: All read SMS; 2: All sent SMS; 3: All sending SMS; 4: All waiting to send SMS; 5: All failed to send SMS, 10: Specified single SMS; 11: All SMS; 12: All received SMS; 13: All SMS in sending area]
The unique identifier for the SMS, it is only needed when It is only needed to remove the specified SMS, i.e. scope is 10

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found]

methods.name: modem.send_sms
methods.summary: Send SMS

schema.description: The PCIe path (Format: {domain}:{bus}:{slot}.{func}) or the USB path (Format: {bus}-{port[.port[.port]]}) for the cellular modem, depends on how the modem is connected, which can be gotten from the get_info interface
The target number to receive SMS, it contains the country code, such as 8617603079726
The SMS content (no more than 140 Bytes)
Timeout time (Unit: Seconds), if the value is set to 0, it means that it will return immediately without waiting for the sending result

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found; -2: Unknown error; -3: Sending failed; -4: Sending timeout; -5: The cellular modem does not support SMS; -6:Current network environment does not support SMS]

oneOf.title: The cellular modem was not found
The cellular modem does not support SMS
Current network environment does not support SMS

methods.name: modem.set_sms
methods.summary: Set the status of SMS

schema.description: The unique identifier for the SMS, it is only omitted when status is 6
The status of the SMS to be set [0: Unread; 1: Read; 2: Sent; 3: Sending; 4: Waiting for send; 5: Failed to send; 6: Set all SMS as read]

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found; -2: SMS does not exist; -3: Failed to set SMS]

oneOf.title: The cellular modem was not found

methods.name: modem.reset_traffic_count
methods.summary: Clear the traffic statistics of the cellular interface

schema.description: The PCIe path (Format: {domain}:{bus}:{slot}.{func}) or the USB path (Format: {bus}-{port[.port[.port]]}) for the cellular modem, depends on how the modem is connected, which can be gotten from the get_info interface

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found]

methods.name: modem.set_traffic_auto_save
methods.summary: Set whether the traffic statistics data of the cellular interface is saved in the modem automatically

schema.description: The PCIe path (Format: {domain}:{bus}:{slot}.{func}) or the USB path (Format: {bus}-{port[.port[.port]]}) for the cellular modem, depends on how the modem is connected, which can be gotten from the get_info interface
Whether to enable automatic saving of traffic statistics data for the cellular modem, and the automatic saving interval is fixed at 30s.

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found]

methods.name: modem.get_traffic_config
methods.summary: Get the traffic statistics data of the cellular interface to be saved automatically

schema.description: The PCIe path (Format: {domain}:{bus}:{slot}.{func}) or the USB path (Format: {bus}-{port[.port[.port]]}) for the cellular modem, depends on how the modem is connected, which can be gotten from the get_info interface

auto_save.description: Get whether the traffic statistics data of the cellular interface is saved automatically.

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found]

methods.name: modem.get_debug_msg
methods.summary: Get the debug information of the target cellular modem

schema.description: The PCIe path (Format: {domain}:{bus}:{slot}.{func}) or the USB path (Format: {bus}-{port[.port[.port]]}) for the cellular modem, depends on how the modem is connected, which can be gotten from the get_info interface

msgs.description: An array of objects, each of the objects means a piece of status message. The specific content is uncertain, determined by the characteristics of the cellular modem

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found; -2: Failed to get information]

oneOf.title: The cellular modem was not found

methods.name: modem.get_sim_info
methods.summary: Get the information of SIM card

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found; -3: the cellular modem initialization failured]

oneOf.title: The cellular modem was not found

methods.name: modem.set_upgrade
methods.summary: Upgrade cellular modem with PCIe access

schema.description: The path to the cellular modem firmware that needs to be downloaded
Target version to upgrade to
Current version of the cellular modem
Firmware getting method [modem: Cellular modem download; router: Router upload]
Hash algorithm used to verify firmware integrity
Hash used to verify firmware integrity, only sha256sum supported currently
Firmware upgrade method [full_ota: Full upgrade; delta_ota: Delta update]

err_code.description: Error code [-1: Faar modem; -2: The current version is the same as the target version; -3: The upgrade is in progress; -4: The version number of the cellular modem does not match the current version; -5: Some parameters is wrong]

oneOf.title: The current version is the same as the target version
The version number of the cellular modem does not match the current version

err_msg.description: Error messageiled to get the version number of the cellul

methods.name: modem.set_slot_config
methods.summary: Set dual SIM card settings. The API only supports setting the built-in cellular modem

schema.description: The PCIe path (Format: {domain}:{bus}:{slot}.{func}) or the USB path (Format: {bus}-{port[.port[.port]]}) for the cellular modem, depends on how the modem is connected, which can be gotten from the get_info interface
Whether enables dual SIM card failover, that is, the backup card is automatically switched when the network of the main card is unavailable
The currently used SIM card slot, which is required when SIM card failover is disabled [1: SIM 1; 2: SIM 2]
The settings ID used for the SIM 1 slot points to a saved settings
The settings ID used for the SIM 2 slot points to a saved settings
The settings network configure for the SIM 1 slot.Refer to 'set_connect'
The settings network configure for the SIM 2 slot.Refer to 'set_connect'
The main SIM slot, which is required when SIM failover is enabled
The failover interval time (Unit: Seconds), which is required when SIM failover is enabled
Whether to enable scheduled switching back to the main card
The hours of scheduled switching time, which is required when scheduled switching back is enabled
The minutes of scheduled switching time, which is required when scheduled switching back is enabled

err_code.description: Error code.

methods.name: modem.get_slot_config
methods.summary: Get dual SIM card settings. The API only supports setting the built-in cellular modem

schema.description: The PCIe path (Format: {domain}:{bus}:{slot}.{func}) or the USB path (Format: {bus}-{port[.port[.port]]}) for the cellular modem, depends on how the modem is connected, which can be gotten from the get_info interface

enable_switch.description: Whether enables dual SIM card failover, that is, the backup card is automatically switched when the network of the main card is unavailable

current_sim.description: The currently used SIM card slot, which is required when SIM card failover is disabled [1: SIM 1; 2: SIM 2]

main_sim.description: The main SIM slot, which is required when SIM failover is enabled

failover_interval.description: The failover interval time (Unit: Seconds), which is required when SIM failover is enabled

sim1_profile.description: The settings ID used for the SIM 1 slot points to a saved settings

sim2_profile.description: The settings ID used for the SIM 2 slot points to a saved settings

enable_timing.description: Whether to enable scheduled switching back to the main card

hour.description: The hours of scheduled switching time, which is required when scheduled switching back is enabled

min.description: The minutes of scheduled switching time, which is required when scheduled switching back is enabled

carrier.description: The network operator's name of the SIM card (The value may not be available if the SIM card requires a PIN to unlock or the SIM card does not store the name)

phone_number.description: The phone nubmer of the SIM card (The value may not be available if the SIM card requires a PIN to unlock or the SIM card does not store the phone number)

iccid.description: The ICCID of the SIM card (The value may not be available if the SIM card requires a PIN to unlock)

carrier.description: The network operator's name of the SIM card (The value may not be available if the SIM card requires a PIN to unlock or the SIM card does not store the name)

phone_number.description: The phone nubmer of the SIM card (The value may not be available if the SIM card requires a PIN to unlock or the SIM card does not store the phone number)

iccid.description: The ICCID of the SIM card (The value may not be available if the SIM card requires a PIN to unlock)

err_code.description: Error code.

methods.name: modem.remove_profile
methods.summary: Remove a saved cellular modem connection settings

schema.description: the ID of the settings to remove

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found]

methods.name: modem.get_profile_list
methods.summary: Get a list of all cellular modem connection settings

id.description: The ID of the cellular modem connection settings

device.description: Port of the device used for connection

service.description: Service type, it is required only when using 3G protocol, i.e. protocol is 3g

username.description: Username for authentication, it is only valid when auth is not NONE

password.description: Password for authentication, it is only valid when auth is not NONE

dial_number.description: Dial number, it is required only when using 3G protocol, i.e. protocol is 3g

ttl.description: Data packet TTL (Time to Live), the data packets sent by the cellular interface will be forced to use the value after setting

ttl_ipv6.description: Data packet IPV6 TTL (Time to Live), the data packets sent by the cellular interface will be forced to use the value after setting

pin_code.description: PIN code, it required to unlock the SIM card

roaming.description: Whether data roaming is enabled [0: Disabled; 1: Enabled]

band_enable.description: Whether channel filtering(masking) is enabled [0: Disabled; 1: Enabled]

band_filter_mode.description: Channel filtering mode [0: allowlist mode, only allow the specified channel; 1: blocklist mode, block the use of the specified channel]

band_list.description: Specify the list of channels to be allow or block, divided into 3 number arrays LTE, NA-SA, NR-NSA

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found]

methods.name: modem.get_sim_signal
methods.summary: Get SIM card information, simplified version of get_sim_info interface, does not judge sim card plugged status and registration status

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found]

methods.name: modem.get_name
methods.summary: Get the cellular modem name

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found]

methods.name: modem.get_signals
methods.summary: Gets the signal for the specified time interval.

schema.description: Time interval.Default:1800s

err_code.description: Error code [-1: The cellular modem was not found]

methods.name: modem.set_cell_tower
methods.summary: Lock specified cell tower.

schema.description: The PCIe path (Format: {domain}:{bus}:{slot}.{func}) or the USB path (Format: {bus}-{port[.port[.port]]}) for the cellular modem, depends on how the modem is connected, which can be gotten from the get_info interface
Slot.0,A card slot;1:slot 1 for dual slot;2:slot 2 for dual slot
Whether to lock the cell tower.true:lock cell tower;false:unlock cell tower
Cellular network type:LTE/NR5G
Mobile Country Code
Mobile Network Code
Cell frequency
Physical cell ID
Cell selection RX level value
Cell selection quality value
Sub-carrier space
Cell identity
Tracking area code
Bandwidth
Frequency band

err_code.description: Error code [-1: Lock tower failed]

methods.name: modem.get_cell_tower
methods.summary: Gets the configuration for locked the tower

err_code.description: Error code [-1: get tower configuration failed]

methods.name: modem.scan_cell_tower
methods.summary: Scan cell tower lists.
